items.name: Winter Brigade Cap (Camo)
items.description:
You like to say you fought with the Cataphracts in the assault at the trenches near Dubauis, and it wouldn’t be far from the truth. Nobody’s sure if they really did give you this hat as a token of gratitude for saving their Lord Commander, but you’re the most veteran guy in the line, so who’s going to call you out on it?
